name_en: Vatican Museums and St. Peter's Basilica
name_local: Musei Vaticani e Basilica di San Pietro

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è la Cappella Sistina, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH lah kap-PEL-lah see-STEE-nah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Segua le indicazioni per i Musei.
likely_response.pronunciation: seh-GOO-ah LEH een-dee-kah-tsee-OH-nee PEHR EE moo-SEH-ee

responses.phonetic: seh-GOO-ah LEH een-dee-kah-tsee-OH-nee PEHR EE moo-SEH-ee
responses.local: Segua le indicazioni per i Musei.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora aprono i Musei?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah KEH OH-rah AH-proh-noh ee moo-ZEH-ee

likely_response.translation_en: The hours are posted at the entrance.

responses.english: The hours are posted at the entrance.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa l'ingresso ai Musei?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOH-stah ling-GRES-so ah-ee moo-ZEH-ee

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated at the ticket office.

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, serve un abbigliamento specifico oggi?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, SER-veh oon ab-bee-lyah-MEN-toh speh-CHEE-fee-koh OJ-jee

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, come si acquista il biglietto qui?
phrases.pronunciation: bwon-JOR-noh KOH-meh see ahk-KWEES-tah eel bee-LYET-toh kwee

likely_response.local: Bisogna prenotare online, qui non si vendono.
likely_response.pronunciation: bee-SOHJ-nah preh-noh-TAH-reh ohn-LEE-neh KW-ee NOHN SEE vehn-DOH-noh
likely_response.translation_en: You must book online, they are not sold here.

responses.english: You must book online, they are not sold here.
responses.phonetic: bee-SOHJ-nah preh-noh-TAH-reh ohn-LEE-neh KW-ee NOHN SEE vehn-DOH-noh
responses.local: Bisogna prenotare online, qui non si vendono.
